caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark grey background. She wears a light green tunic featuring an embroidered neckline and a dark necklace. In the first frame, she gestures with her right hand raised. As the sequence progresses, she continues speaking, shifting her hand positions to emphasize her points, bringing both hands up into a gesturing motion by the final frame. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her tunic. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". The camera remains in a static medium shot, focusing on the woman from the chest up as she delivers her presentation.
